entryPoint.trigger: onClick on Add button (line 831), also delegated from handleTagKeyPress on Enter key (line 659–663)

calls.notes: Guards: (1) newTag = tagEditorInput.trim() must be truthy, (2) newTag must not already be in tagEditorTags, (3) tagEditorTags.length must be < 10. When all guards pass: appends newTag to tagEditorTags and sets tagEditorInput to ''. When any guard fails: no state change (silent no-op).

companionHandler.notes: If e.key === 'Enter', calls e.preventDefault() then delegates to handleAddTag(). Acts as a keyboard shortcut for the Add button; identical validation applies.
